---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Contact

Feel free to reach out to me via the following channels:

- 📧 **Email:** jenny.hoeglauer@outlook.com
- 🔗 **GitHub:** [JennyHoeglauer](https://github.com/JennyHoeglauer)
- 💼 **LinkedIn:** [Jenny Höglauer](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jenny-h%C3%B6glauer-62b429254/)

## References

Available upon request.
